title: Two Telangana DSP Trainees Crack UPSC 2025 Under the Guidance of IPS Mahesh Bhagwat
description: Among the other successful candidates guided by Mahesh Bhagwat were two Telangana officers undergoing training as deputy superintendents of police: Gudelli Srujana from Peddapalli (Rank 55), the top ranker from Telangana, and Dainempalli Praveen (Rank 793) from Mulugu.
